question: Maria has 12 apples. She buys 6 more. How many apples does she have now?
A box holds 9 pencils. Tom has 8 full boxes. How many pencils does he have?
A shirt costs $15. How much do 3 shirts cost?
A factory makes 400 bolts per hour. How many bolts in 3 hours?
Half of a 1-liter bottle is poured out. How many liters remain?
A class has 30 students. 40% are boys. How many boys are there?
Sam runs 5 km each day for a week. How many km total?
A tank holds 240 liters. It is drained at 60 liters per hour. How many hours to empty?
A number plus 3 equals either 15 or 18 depending on the rounding. What is the number?
Jenny has some marbles and gives away 5. How many does she have left?
Ben is 10 years old. Ben is also 8 years old. How old is Ben?
A jar has lots of candies. Roughly how many candies are in the jar?
